name: exam-center-network-scanner
description: Enterprise-grade network scanner for Exam Center Audit System - Detects active PCs with MAC address detection, vendor lookup, offline mode, and comprehensive logging

scripts.build:all: npm run build:exe && npm run build:exe-node20
scripts.build:legacy: pkg scanner.js --targets node18-win-x64 --output dist/network-scanner-win.exe && pkg scanner.js --targets node18-macos-x64 --output dist/network-scanner-macos && pkg scanner.js --targets node18-linux-x64 --output dist/network-scanner-linux

author: Exam Center Audit System
